conversation.message: How have you been feeling lately?
im super good, i know whts cmg for me!!
You said you know what's coming for you—what do you mean by that?
means im gona end it lol, im happy its coming to an end
You said you're happy it's coming to an end—what does that feel like for you day to day?
You mentioned being happy it's ending—has that feeling changed how you sleep at all?
i think im sleeping better, cos i will sleep forver soon
You said you'll sleep forever soon—has that made it harder to care about your usual activities?
You said you'll sleep forever soon—do you ever think about what you might be leaving behind?
yea i do but i think it will be fine
You mentioned thinking it will be fine for what you leave behind—what does "fine" look like to you?
them being unaffected and soon continuing thier lives
You mentioned they'll be unaffected—how does that make you feel about your own role in their lives?
idk, i might be playing a smaller role, but im glad, cos tht means they wont be affected when i go
